author: gowtham0992
name: JEPA: Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture for LLMs
blurb: First JEPA submission. Auxiliary JEPA loss alongside NTP: two views via random token masking, cosine similarity between mean-pooled embeddings, stop-gradient on target. Following LLM-JEPA (Balestriero et al., 2509.14252). Sliding window eval only. 8xH100 SXM, 1790 steps at 310ms/step.
